ValidationRule.description: Prevents moving to Proposal Sent unless Expected Headcount, Event Type, Event Start Date, and Quoted Price are populated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Proposal Sent'), OR( ISBLANK(Expected_Headcount__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Event_Type__c)), ISBLANK(Event_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Quoted_Price__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot move to Proposal Sent until Expected Headcount, Event Type, Event Start Date, and Quoted Price are all populated.
